gemma_observations: Rahul Tewatia is looking for boundaries off Mohammed Shami.
Sundar is attempting to rotate the strike against Yadav.
Shami is bowling defensively, conceding easy singles.
Tewatia is prioritizing singles over risky shots.
Washington Sundar attempted a slog sweep with limited success against the GT bowlers.
Rahul Tewatia rotated the strike effectively, prioritizing dot balls in the final overs.
